creator: trueos@norwegianrockcat.com
text:
(In reply to guido from comment #12)

Strange. Well, maybe some configuration details about loopback weren't correct? I admit I just did a very cursory look at the failing test, and my understanding of Perl is rudimentary at best.

Regardless, glad that it worked now! I'll keep this bug around though so that I can see what is going wrong with the script just saying that everything is OK and proceeding to staging. At least I know of a way to trigger the problem. So, thanks for the report.
